posts.author: Jugal_Doshi
posts.text: While locals will come & show impressive growth due to low base, MNCs will also continue to grow at decent rates due to strengths like brand building, sourcing capabilities, cost controls & distribution. However, gone are the days when MNCs could sell anything and everything in the name of brand. They will have to be lean, focused, category specific. This is already evident with Unilever moving out of ice cream business, focusing on non-food categories. (Unilever: “Doing fewer things, better”) Nestle looking to sell its water business, RB selling majority stake in food business.
